description_long: This is a tall, elegant vase with a flared rim and a narrow neck that widens into a rounded body before tapering to a smaller base. The surface is predominantly black with a glossy, mosaic-like texture, and it features a striking, detailed illustration of a golden, mechanical insect or creature entwined with chains, set against a cosmic, star-speckled background. The artwork is concentrated on one side, making it a focal point, while the rest of the vase is darker and less decorated. The material appears to be ceramic or porcelain with a high-gloss finish, giving it a reflective quality. The vase is hollow, designed to hold flowers or decorative items, and its sturdy build suggests it could be used both indoors and outdoors. The overall impression is of a modern, artistic piece that combines traditional vase form with contemporary, fantastical ornamentation.
description: A tall, glossy black vase with a flared rim, featuring a golden mechanical insect motif against a cosmic background. The surface is mosaic-textured and highly reflective, with the artwork concentrated on one side.
description_view_0: The front view showcases the detailed golden mechanical insect and chain motif, set against a starry, cosmic background.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the continuation of the cosmic pattern, with partial visibility of the golden motif and more of the dark, glossy surface.
description_view_2: The back view is mostly dark and glossy, with minimal decoration and only faint hints of the cosmic pattern.
description_view_3: This angled view shows the edge of the golden motif and more of the star-speckled background, with the mosaic texture prominent.
attribute_location: urban plaza or public art display
attribute_pattern: fantastical motif with cosmic and mechanical elements
